summary: Comprehensive testing of SCF Platform with all three user flows (Maker, Checker, CP). All 31 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing completed for login, OTP verification, dashboard, invoices, channel partners, and repayment features. All core functionalities working correctly.
passed_tests: Auth - Maker login returns session_id with role anchor_maker
Auth - Checker login returns session_id with role anchor_checker
Auth - CP login returns session_id with role channel_partner
Auth - Invalid credentials return 401
Auth - OTP verification returns token and user for all roles
Auth - Invalid OTP returns 401
Maker - Can view all invoices
Maker - Can filter invoices by status
Maker - Can create new invoice (status=pending_checker_approval)
Maker - Can view single invoice details
Maker - Raise Invoice button visible in header
Maker - Raise Invoice modal opens and works correctly
Maker - Invoice detail shows CP Limit Details
Checker - Cannot create invoices (403 Forbidden)
Checker - Can view all invoices
Checker - Can approve pending invoice to approved_l1
Checker - Can reject pending invoice with remarks
Checker - NO Raise Invoice button visible (correct)
Checker - Dashboard shows correct stats without Raise Invoice card
Checker - Quick action cards work (Review Invoices, View Channel Partners)
Checker - Sees CP Limit details before approving invoice
Checker - Channel Partners page shows sanctioned_limit, utilized, available columns
CP - Cannot create invoices (403 Forbidden)
CP - Gets only their own invoices (Jagdamba Motors)
CP - Can give final approval (fully_approved) to L1-approved invoices
CP - Can reject L1-approved invoices (rejected_cp)
CP - Dashboard shows welcome banner with user name
CP - Dashboard shows stats (My SCF Limit, Active Programs, Total Invoices, Fully Approved)
CP - Dashboard shows My Active Programs table
CP - Invoices page shows proper status badges
CP - Invoice detail shows CP Limit Details and Checker Approval info
CP - Channel Partners page with detail modal on row click
CP - Repayment page with tabs (All, Paid, Pending, Overdue)
CP - Repayment shows summary stats (Total Disbursed, Repaid, Pending, Overdue)
Stats API - Returns correct stats for all roles
Channel Partners API - Returns list with sanctioned_limit field
Programs API - Returns all programs for Maker, filtered for CP
Repayment API - Returns ledger data with correct fields
Unauthorized access blocked (401/403) for protected endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test invoices created during backend testing with prefixes: TEST-INV-, APPROVE-TEST-, REJECT-TEST-, CP-APPROVE-, CP-REJECT-
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three user flows fully tested. Backend has 31 pytest tests covering auth, invoice CRUD, status updates, stats, channel partners, programs, and repayment APIs. Frontend flows verified: login -> OTP -> dashboard -> invoices -> channel partners -> repayment. Invoice approval flow: pending_checker_approval -> approved_l1 (by checker) -> fully_approved (by CP). Rejection statuses: rejected_checker, rejected_cp. CP sees only Jagdamba Motors invoices. Checker sees CP Limit Details before approval.
